run_summary.professor_safe_summary: Gamma reads accepted Deep ML model prediction artifacts and Phase 12 news-context rows to build context-aware sensitivity artifacts and tooltips.

quality_review.professor_safe_summary: Gamma is a source-context and sensitivity layer. It joins Phase 12 news context to model prediction dates and supports chart tooltips. It does not claim causality.

diagnostics_snapshot.professor_safe_note: Diagnostics describe execution and output integrity only. They do not claim news caused gold price movement.

historical_manifest_snapshot.source_policy: Fixed daily index. 2017 onward uses sampled GDELT DOC API where available. Pre-2017 rows are retained with explicit coverage notes unless a future bulk historical GDELT/GKG loader is added.
historical_manifest_snapshot.google_news_rss_policy: Google News RSS is a recent fallback only, not a 2006 historical archive.

mode_status_snapshot.manual_factor_policy: manual/local factors carried forward unless source CSVs are added
mode_status_snapshot.frontend_policy: RecursiveClientView.tsx and model3 frontend were not modified.

fred_merge_summary.merge_policy: FRED values are forward-filled onto post-cutoff Yahoo gold dates; manual factors remain carried forward.

latest_daily_context.source_coverage_note: Historical/recent public source rows were loaded for this date. Scores summarize source coverage, not causality.

latest_context_snapshot.professor_safe_note: Recent headlines are for context/tooltips only and should not be presented as causal drivers.

sensitivity_snapshot.interpretation_rule: Correlations and bucket summaries describe co-movement between model errors and loaded news-context fields only. They do not imply news caused gold movement.
sensitivity_snapshot.professor_safe_note: Gamma summarizes context coverage and model behavior under Phase 12 news-context rows. It is not a causal model.

allowed_claims: Gamma joins Phase 12 news-context rows to model prediction dates.
Gamma provides context-aware tooltip fields for model charts.
Gamma summarizes model behavior under loaded news-context buckets.
Gamma does not claim news caused gold price movement.
Historical rows are continuity/index rows with coverage limitations.
forbidden_claims: Gamma proves news caused gold prices to move.
Zero historical news score means no news existed.
Google News RSS is a complete historical archive from 2006.
Gamma is the final Deep ML forecast winner.

next_step_after_acceptance.instruction: After Gamma is accepted, recall all Alpha/Beta/Delta/Epsilon/Gamma reports, evaluations, forecasts, and public paths before rebuilding Omega.

final_instruction: Send me artifacts/deep_ml/models/gamma_news_sensitivity/phase13_gamma_news_sensitivity_report.json for review before running Omega.
